dashboard.myOverview: A focused overview of your membership

portal.title: My Subscriptions
portal.regularStatus: You are up to date on this path
portal.ruleDesc: These amounts were generated based on the terms of your subscription on this path. Paying each period on time preserves your wallet entitlements.
portal.suspensionWarning: Your subscription may be suspended if this payment is not settled
portal.myWalletsDesc: My obligations and entitlements in each fund
portal.relationshipLine: You are subscribed to <bold>{wallet}</bold> via <bold>{path}</bold> within <bold>{fund}</bold>.
portal.outcomeSupporterOnly: You are a supporter only on this path: your contribution supports the wallet but does not grant entitlement or request rights.
portal.outcomeConditional: Your participation is conditional: obligations appear, but entitlement and voting rights remain limited until you become active.
portal.outcomeOverdue: You have {count} overdue payment(s); delays may affect your entitlement or voting rights depending on path policy.
portal.outcomeRights: You are entitled to {count} disbursement item(s) on this path once eligibility conditions are met.
portal.outcomeNoRights: There are no active entitlement items on this path currently.
portal.rightsBlockedSupporterTitle: No entitlement rights for this subscription
portal.rightsBlockedSupporterDesc: This path is support-only, so no disbursement request button appears and this contribution does not count toward entitlement eligibility.
portal.rightsBlockedConditionalTitle: Your rights are not yet activated
portal.rightsBlockedConditionalDesc: Your participation is still conditional. Entitlement items and disbursement requests will appear after the fund administration activates the subscription.
portal.rightsBlockedNoneDesc: This path does not allow disbursement requests currently.
portal.genericLoadError: An error occurred while loading your wallets
portal.emptyHintMultiple: You are a member of {count} funds — open a fund to activate a subscription on one of its paths.
portal.emptyHintSingle: You are a member of "{name}" — open the fund to activate a subscription on one of its paths.
portal.emptyHintNone: Join a fund or create a new one to get started.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.emptyTitle: No operational subscriptions for this fund yet
subscriptions.emptyBody: You may belong to the fund, but rights and obligations do not truly start until you are linked to a wallet, governance path, and clear subscription.
subscriptions.chooseEntity: Select a fund to view its subscriptions.
subscriptions.prompt: Select a fund or campaign to view subscriptions
subscriptions.relationshipTitle: Your operational relationship in this fund
subscriptions.relationshipText: These subscriptions define your obligations and rights inside {entity}: which wallet you participate in, and through which governance path.
subscriptions.relationshipOutcome: Each subscription links your membership to a wallet and path; the subscription state determines whether you can vote or benefit.
subscriptions.relationshipNoSubs: No subscriptions yet; fund membership does not grant wallet rights until it is linked to a path.
subscriptions.prefsGovernanceConflict: This path uses {actual}, while your conditions accept: {accepted}. The subscription may remain conditional.
subscriptions.prefsCapConflict: The amount {amount} is above your accepted cap {cap}. Review the condition before activation.
subscriptions.prefsAuditRequirement: You require independent audit/transparency before rights become complete.
subscriptions.prefsCommitteeRequirement: You require committee approval before rights become complete.
subscriptions.prefsNewSubscriptionImpact: Impact of your conditions on this new subscription
subscriptions.relationshipRowActive: Active: the obligation is counted, and rights follow this path's rules.
subscriptions.relationshipRowConditional: Conditional: the obligation is visible, but rights wait for condition activation.
subscriptions.relationshipRowSupporterOnly: Supporter only: you contribute to the balance without direct benefit rights.
subscriptions.relationshipRowInterested: Interested: this is not active yet.
subscriptions.relationshipRowSuspended: Suspended: rights and obligations are paused until reactivation.
subscriptions.relationshipRowExited: Exited: this subscription is outside current operation.
subscriptions.rowRightsActive: Your subscription is active; voting or benefit rights apply only according to this path and wallet rules.
subscriptions.rowRightsConditional: You are conditional; the obligation is visible, but voting or benefit rights are not complete until the condition is activated.
subscriptions.rowRightsSupporterOnly: You are supporter only; you contribute financially without direct benefit rights in this path.
subscriptions.rowRightsSuspended: The subscription is suspended; do not count it for voting or benefit rights until reactivated.
subscriptions.rowRightsInterested: You are interested only; operational obligation and rights have not started yet.
subscriptions.rowRightsExited: This subscription has exited and is not part of current rights or obligations.
subscriptions.campaignRelationshipTitle: Your operational relationship in this campaign
subscriptions.campaignRelationshipText: These subscriptions define your obligations and rights inside {entity}: which wallet you participate in, and through which governance path.
subscriptions.campaignRelationshipNoSubs: No subscriptions yet; campaign membership does not grant wallet rights until it is linked to a path.
subscriptions.termsSummary:
By subscribing to this path, you acknowledge:
- The subscription follows the agreed amount for each payment period
- You are subject to the fund governance mechanism
- Repeated delay may suspend the subscription
- Benefit rights are tied to the fund internal rules
subscriptions.campaignTermsSummary:
By subscribing to this path, you acknowledge:
- The subscription follows the agreed amount for each payment period
- You are subject to the campaign governance mechanism
- Repeated delay may suspend the subscription
- Benefit rights are tied to the campaign internal rules

decisions.title: Decisions & Voting
decisions.retryConfirm: Are you sure you want to retry executing this decision?
decisions.coiDeclareNote: I declare a conflict of interest — abstaining from vote
decisions.coiNote: If you are a direct party to this decision (beneficiary, or subject of expulsion/acceptance), you must abstain.
decisions.coiActiveNote: You declared a conflict of interest — your vote will be recorded as Abstain
decisions.whyVoteTitle: Why are you being asked to vote on this decision?
decisions.whyVisibleTitle: Why is this decision visible to you?
decisions.reasonEviction: You are being asked to vote because you are a board member — expulsion decisions require a collective vote.
decisions.reasonMembership: You are being asked to vote because you are a member of the membership acceptance committee.
decisions.reasonDisbursement: You are being asked to vote because you are a member of the disbursement approval committee.
decisions.reasonPolicy: You are being asked to vote because modifying subscription terms requires collective approval.
decisions.reasonGovernance: You are being asked to vote because changing governance mechanisms requires a collective decision.
decisions.reasonDefault: You are being asked to vote in accordance with the fund's bylaws.
decisions.reasonFamilyVote: You are being asked to vote because you are subscribed to this path, and one vote will be counted for your household.
decisions.reasonPathSubscriber: You are being asked to vote because you are an active subscriber in {path}.
decisions.reasonCommitteeVote: You are being asked to vote because you are a member of the committee responsible for this path.
decisions.reasonAlreadyVoted: This decision remains visible for follow-up, and your vote has already been recorded.
decisions.reasonVisibleCommitteeOnly: This decision is visible for transparency, but voting is limited to the responsible committee.
decisions.reasonVisiblePathOnly: This decision is visible for transparency, but voting is limited to active subscribers in {path}.
decisions.reasonVisibleObserver: This decision is visible for follow-up and transparency, but it does not require your vote right now.
decisions.alreadyVoted: Your vote has been recorded for this decision.
decisions.notEligibleToVote: This decision does not require your vote right now.
decisions.familyVoteWarning: You are voting on behalf of your household. Any other vote from the same household will be blocked.
decisions.effectDisburseFunds: If this decision closes as approved, it becomes the governance reference for disbursing funds from the same path; it must not be reused for a different path or amount.
decisions.effectTransferBalance: This decision affects two path balances; source and destination must be verified before execution.
decisions.effectModifySubscription: This decision may change subscription obligations or state, affecting payments and rights.
decisions.effectModifyGovernance: This decision changes future governance rules and may affect who votes and who reviews.
decisions.effectAcceptMember: This decision activates a member-fund relationship and may enable later subscriptions and rights.
decisions.effectExpelMember: This decision may suspend membership or restrict a member's rights; the reason must be clear and documented.
decisions.effectCreateWallet: This decision creates a new financial space that still needs paths and rules before real operation.
decisions.effectCreatePath: This decision creates a new path inside a wallet, isolating independent rights and obligations.
decisions.effectGeneral: This decision is visible because it is linked to your membership or role in the fund; review its type and path before voting.
decisions.effectAffectedDisburseFunds: Only the balance and rights of {path}; it must not spill into other wallets or paths.
decisions.effectAffectedTransferBalance: The source and destination path or wallet, with a direct effect on both balances.
decisions.effectAffectedModifySubscription: Subscribers in {path}: obligations, dues, and possibly vote or benefit eligibility.
decisions.effectAffectedModifyGovernance: Future voters, reviewers, and decisions in the fund or path.
decisions.effectAffectedAcceptMember: The candidate member and the fund; later subscriptions and rights may open.
decisions.effectAffectedExpelMember: The member subject to the decision and their current rights in the fund or path.
decisions.effectAffectedCreateWallet: Fund members and finance roles who will operate the new wallet.
decisions.effectAffectedCreatePath: Potential subscribers in the new path and any funds isolated inside it.
decisions.effectAffectedGeneral: Members or roles who can see the decision according to its scope.
decisions.effectNextVote: Review the impact, then vote; the decision is not executable until voting closes.
decisions.effectNextObserve: Follow the decision only; voting is outside your current permission.
decisions.effectNextAppeal: An appeal exists; review the appeal context before any new execution.
decisions.effectNextRetry: Execution failed; an authorized reviewer must inspect the cause before retrying.
decisions.effectNextDisburse: Use this decision as the reference for a matching disbursement from the same path and amount.
decisions.effectNextExecute: The decision is approved; execute the effect through the correct workflow and audit it.
decisions.effectNextRejected: No financial or operational execution should happen; appeal if allowed.
decisions.effectNextCompleted: The effect is complete or no extra execution step is required; review the audit log if needed.
decisions.appealPanelTitle: Do you object to this decision outcome?
decisions.appealPanelHint: An appeal links your objection directly to this decision. If the matter becomes a formal conflict, you can then open a dispute linked to the same appeal.
decisions.appealReasonPlaceholder: Explain what you object to and why this decision needs review…
decisions.appealRequestedActionPlaceholder: Example: repeat the vote, request more documents, or committee review.
decisions.appealSuccess: ✓ Appeal recorded and linked to this decision
decisions.appealNextStep: Appeal {id} was created. Wait for a response or open a linked dispute if mediation is needed.

disputes.title: Disputes
disputes.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the details of the dispute…
disputes.linkedAppealTitle: Dispute linked to an appeal on decision: {decision}
disputes.linkedAppealDescription: This dispute is linked to appeal {appeal} on decision "{decision}". Explain why the appeal process was not enough, and what impact or settlement is requested.
disputes.linkedContextTitle: This dispute is linked to an earlier appeal
disputes.linkedContextDesc: The dispute will be saved with the appeal and original decision context so reviewers can follow the timeline from decision to appeal to dispute.
disputes.linkedDisbursementDescription: This dispute is linked to disbursement request {id}: {request}. Explain why you believe the rejection is incorrect, and what documents or settlement you propose.
disputes.linkedDisbursementContextTitle: This dispute is linked to a rejected disbursement request
disputes.linkedDisbursementContextDesc: The disbursement request ID will be kept in the dispute description so reviewers can trace the rejection, reason, and next step.
disputes.linkedMemberDescription: This dispute is linked to {member}. Explain the conflict, which action seems incorrect, and what settlement or decision is requested.
disputes.linkedMemberContextTitle: This dispute is linked to a specific member
disputes.linkedMemberContextDesc: The dispute will open with the selected member as the responding party so reviewers can follow the relationship context inside the fund.
disputes.ruleHintsMsg: ⚠ Could not open dispute due to the following governance rules:
disputes.howItWorksTitle: How does the dispute process work?
disputes.howItWorksDesc: You can open a dispute when objecting to a decision or transaction. The admin reviews the dispute and can resolve or escalate it. Resolution timelines are governed by fund bylaws.
disputes.processRuleSummary: To resolve this dispute, update the status to Resolved or Closed and attach arbitrator notes. All actions are saved to the dispute record.

documents.title: Documents
documents.chooseEntity: Select a fund to view its documents.
documents.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
documents.prompt: Select a fund to view documents

profile.usernameHint: Must start with a letter; 3–32 characters (letters, digits, or underscores)
profile.phoneLockedHint: Your mobile number is tied to your login. Changing it requires verification through support.
profile.activationBannerDesc: Activate your account to be able to create your own funds.
profile.phoneActivationHint: A verification code will be sent to {phone}
profile.activationSuccess: ✓ Your account has been successfully activated
profile.noPhoneHint1: Add your mobile number in the settings above, then activate your account using the verification code.
profile.noPhoneHint2: Activation allows you to create your own funds.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.matrixHint: This matrix shows the event, notification type, recipients, and linked target so notifications are not a black box.
notifications.matrixRecipientsDecisionScope: By decision scope: path subscribers or all active fund members.
notifications.matrixRecipientsPaymentOwner: Only the subscription or payment owner.
notifications.matrixRecipientsActiveMembersExceptActor: Active members except the actor who made the change.
notifications.matrixRecipientsAffectedSubscribers: Subscribers affected by the path change.
notifications.matrixRecipientsTargetEntityAdminsFounde: Founders and admins of the target fund.
notifications.matrixRecipientsSourceEntityAdminsFounde: Founders and admins of the requesting fund.

paths.noSubscriptionsTitle: No members are linked to this path yet
paths.noSubscriptionsBody: This means the balance and decisions exist without clear member rights and obligations. Link members to this path before requesting payment, voting, or benefit access.
paths.contextText: This path belongs to {wallet}. Its type is {type}, so it defines who pays, who votes, and who can benefit.
paths.contextBoard: This path is governed by a board; decisions and rights follow board rules, and general fund membership alone is not enough.
paths.contextCommittee: Disbursement and benefit here are tied to committee approval; fund membership alone is not enough to vote or benefit from this path.
paths.contextPublicVote: This path uses public voting; voting rights are limited to this path's members and do not carry to other paths.
paths.contextIndividual: This path allows individual action within a defined cap; review spending items before executing any request.
paths.contextDonation: This is a donation-only path; contributors support the balance without direct benefit rights.
paths.contextEmergency: This is a fast emergency path; decisions must remain documented despite faster execution.
paths.contextGeneral: This path isolates balance, decisions, and rights from the other paths in the wallet.
paths.ruleBoard: This path is board-governed; do not approve a financial action or benefit right except through the board decision and path policy.
paths.ruleCommittee: This path requires committee approval — disbursements cannot proceed without sign-off from the designated committee members.
paths.rulePublicVote: This path uses public voting; a decision is not complete until quorum and approval thresholds are met inside this path.
paths.ruleIndividual: Disbursement decisions in this path are individual — treasurer signature is sufficient.
paths.ruleDonation: This path is for support only; do not treat it as an individual benefit right unless policy explicitly says so.
paths.ruleEmergency: This path is for fast emergency response; speed does not remove documentation or later review.
paths.ruleGeneral: The governance rules defined for this path apply to every disbursement request.
